mentions.note: Blowout quarter: 17% revenue growth, 25¢ EPS beat, 17% DTC comp growth (vs. 8.5% exp.), taking share in women's and accessories. CEO Patrice Louvet's execution exceptional; brand on fire; stock rallied 14%.
Luxury apparel brand trading at low-to-mid 20s P/E; positive comparator for Levi's turnaround story.
Flawless execution and renewed investor interest; part of retail rotation.
